channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: McConnell's office confirms he remains hospitalized but does not disclose reason
item.description: Senator Mitch McConnell is still in the hospital nearly three weeks after being admitted, his office confirmed Thursday.

item.title: Marx and Engels' Views on Socialism in the United States
item.description: Sanders, Mamdani, and AOC aim to replace Americanism with socialism, a goal even Marx and Engels questioned.

item.title: America Faces a Gratitude Crisis
item.description: Unlike the Founders, today's Americans often overlook their blessings.
